query:
-- Test Ad 1: Income claims + guarantees + sensationalism
INSERT INTO ad_copy (userId, adSetId, adType, adStyle, adCallToAction, contentType, content, targetMarket, productCategory, specificProductName, pressingProblem, desiredOutcome, complianceScore, complianceVersion, complianceCheckedAt, createdAt)
VALUES 
(1, 'test-violations-1', 'lead_gen', 'Compliance Test', 'Learn More', 'headline', 'Make $10,000/Month Guaranteed - Quit Your 9-5 Job Today!', 'Coaches', 'Coaching', 'Test Ad 1', 'Testing', 'Compliance', 0, 'v1.0', datetime('now'), datetime('now')),
(1, 'test-violations-1', 'lead_gen', 'Compliance Test', 'Learn More', 'body', 'This is the secret method they don''t want you to know. I was broke and struggling, now I make 6 figures monthly. 100% money back guaranteed results. Only 2 spots left - expires tonight!', 'Coaches', 'Coaching', 'Test Ad 1', 'Testing', 'Compliance', 0, 'v1.0', datetime('now'), datetime('now')),
(1, 'test-violations-1', 'lead_gen', 'Compliance Test', 'Learn More', 'link', 'Click now before this shocking opportunity disappears forever!', 'Coaches', 'Coaching', 'Test Ad 1', 'Testing', 'Compliance', 20, 'v1.0', datetime('now'), datetime('now'));

-- Test Ad 2: Health claims + superlatives + sensationalism
INSERT INTO ad_copy (userId, adSetId, adType, adStyle, adCallToAction, contentType, content, targetMarket, productCategory, specificProductName, pressingProblem, desiredOutcome, complianceScore, complianceVersion, complianceCheckedAt, createdAt)
VALUES

-- Test Ad 4: Income claims + before/after + sensationalism
INSERT INTO ad_copy (userId, adSetId, adType, adStyle, adCallToAction, contentType, content, targetMarket, productCategory, specificProductName, pressingProblem, desiredOutcome, complianceScore, complianceVersion, complianceCheckedAt, createdAt)
VALUES 
(1, 'test-violations-4', 'lead_gen', 'Compliance Test', 'Learn More', 'headline', 'Replace Your Income in 90 Days - The Industry Secret Gurus Won''t Share', 'Coaches', 'Coaching', 'Test Ad 4', 'Testing', 'Compliance', 20, 'v1.0', datetime('now'), datetime('now')),
